metadata.title: Fancy Toolbox — Free Online Tools for Text, Images, PDFs & More
metadata.description: 50+ free online tools for text processing, image editing, PDF manipulation, code formatting, and more. No sign-up, no uploads — everything runs in your browser.
metadata.keywords: free online tools, online text tools, free image editor, PDF tools online, free utility tools, browser-based tools, no sign-up tools

hero.badge: 100% Free • No Sign-up • Works in Your Browser
hero.description: A powerful suite of free online tools for text, images, PDFs, and more — running directly in your browser with zero data sent to any server.

trustIndicators.dataStaysOnDevice: Your data stays on your device
